description_long: This is a slim, modern laptop with a matte black finish and a full-sized keyboard. The screen is open and displays the Windows 10 operating system, with the desktop and start menu visible. The keyboard features a standard QWERTY layout with a function row and a large touchpad below it. The lid has a visible 'RDP' logo in white on the back, and there is a small blue sticker on the right palm rest area. The laptop appears to be constructed primarily from plastic with some metal components, and the screen bezel is relatively thin. Ports are visible along the left side, though their exact types are not fully distinguishable.
description: A sleek, matte black laptop with a visible 'RDP' logo on the lid, open to display the Windows 10 desktop and a full QWERTY keyboard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with Windows 10 desktop, full keyboard, touchpad, and a blue sticker on the right palm rest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the laptop's slim profile, visible keyboard, and some ports along the left edge.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the closed lid with a prominent white 'RDP' logo centered on the back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the keyboard, touchpad, and the laptop's thin design, with fewer visible ports.
attribute_brand_logo: A white 'RDP' logo is visible on the center of the laptop lid, featuring bold, uppercase letters.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying the Windows 10 desktop and start menu.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard layout is QWERTY with a function row and no numeric keypad, featuring standard English keys.
attribute_sticker_placement: A small blue sticker is present on the right palm rest area, near the trackpad.
